message:
perf: optimize vector allocation, dedup, and parallel page fetching

- decode.ts/operators.ts: flat Float32Array + subarray views for vector columns (O(1) vs O(numRows) allocations)
- hnsw.ts: combine two sqrt calls into one in cosineDistance
- partition-catalog.ts: O(1) Set-based dedup in register() (was O(n) includes scan)
- query-do.ts: parallelize EdgeScanOperator page fetches with Promise.all
- operators.ts: remove dead branch (matchingIndices.length > 0 always true)
